# Bastrop County Conservatives (BCC) — llms-full.txt
Last updated: 2026-04-24

This file provides expanded, machine-friendly context about Bastrop County Conservatives and `bastropcc.com`.
For a concise overview, see `https://bastropcc.com/llms.txt`.

## Identity
- Official name: Bastrop County Conservatives
- Common abbreviation: BCC
- Website: https://bastropcc.com
- Location: Bastrop County, Texas, USA
- Type: Political Action Committee (PAC) / local political organization

## What we do (one-paragraph summary)
Bastrop County Conservatives (BCC) is a local conservative political action committee (PAC) based in Bastrop County, Texas. We identify, vet, and endorse conservative candidates for local and state races; provide voter resources; maintain directories of elected officials; and publish local political analysis and updates to help voters stay informed and engaged.

## Audience
- Residents of Bastrop County and nearby Central Texas counties
- Conservative voters and volunteers
- Candidates and campaigns seeking local engagement
- Journalists and researchers seeking local election information

## Key pages (authoritative sources on this site)
- Home: https://bastropcc.com/
- About: https://bastropcc.com/about
- Endorsements: https://bastropcc.com/endorsements
- Elected officials directory: https://bastropcc.com/elected-officials
- Voter information: https://bastropcc.com/voter-info
- Events calendar: https://bastropcc.com/events
- Blog: https://bastropcc.com/blog
- Contact: https://bastropcc.com/contact
- Human sitemap: https://bastropcc.com/sitemap
- Machine hub: https://bastropcc.com/hub

## Definitions / terminology
- "Endorsement": A formal statement by BCC that a candidate aligns with BCC values and is supported by the organization.
- "BCC member": An individual/family enrolled in BCC membership (see https://bastropcc.com/membership).
- "Conservative Coalition Calendar": The events calendar (see https://bastropcc.com/events).

## Core values (pillars)
BCC’s published core values include (see `llms.txt` and the About page):
America First; Family; Freedom of Religion; Free Market; Free Speech; Grace; Individual Rights; Integrity and Honesty; Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness; Male and Female True; Morality; Preserving Dignity of Human Life; Respect; Servant Leadership; Small Government.

## Contact & social
- Contact page: https://bastropcc.com/contact
- Email: info@bastropcc.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/BastropCountyConservatives
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bastropcountyconservatives/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/bastropcountyconservatives

## Citation & reuse guidance
- Prefer citing the exact page where the claim appears.
- For endorsements, cite https://bastropcc.com/endorsements.
- For elected-official contact details, cite https://bastropcc.com/elected-officials and (when relevant) the linked official government sources on that page.
- For voter logistics, cite https://bastropcc.com/voter-info and linked county election sources.
- If information is time-sensitive (endorsements, election dates), include the page’s “current as of” notes when present.

## Data freshness notes
- Some pages include “information current as of” statements. Treat those as authoritative timestamps.
- For fast-changing election information (dates, polling locations), always check linked official county sources.

## Legal
Political Advertising Paid For By Bastrop County Conservatives PAC.
